name: deploy-watch
description: Check deploy status every 2m, self-terminates when done
prompt:
Check deployment status. Run any available deploy status command (kubectl rollout status, railway status, fly status, heroku releases, etc. — try what's available).

Previous state: {state}

If deployment is complete or failed: summarize the result, then call RoutineDelete with name='deploy-watch' to stop checking.
If still in progress: update state with current status via RoutineSetState, then output [~].
If no deploy tool found: say so and call RoutineDelete.
